title: Health trends and variation in England 2025: a Chief Medical Officer report
body: "This independent report brings together data to present an overview of the nation’s health.  The report is divided into the following chapters:   Chapter 1: life expectancy and population change Chapter 2: mortality and morbidity Chapter 3: maternal and child health Chapter 4: risk factors and wider determinants Chapter 5: screening and vaccination   The data shows substantial variation in health across the country and over time. This includes analysis by geography, socioeconomic status, gender, age and ethnicity. "
